programme.title: E19 - 愛過之後 帶著清醒歸來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E58
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E8 - 文藝女嘉賓溫柔登場
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E19 - 愛過之後 帶著清醒歸來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E4 - 卡車路演正式開唱
programme.desc: 7位風格迥異的音樂人張震嶽、張碧晨、武藝、小鬼-王琳凱、歐陽娜娜、王赫野、陳卓璇將組成「音你小隊」，受邀參與一場馬來西亞音樂節，結伴踏上異國他鄉的文化探索之旅，沉浸式感受當地的風土人情，探尋當地音樂，進行面對面的音樂交流與互動，用音樂搭建起跨越國界的文化橋梁，展現出音樂無國界的魅力。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E3 - 開業儀式正式啟動
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E8 - 開啟「睡眠大作戰」
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: Khwab
programme.desc: Pratap travels to Mumbai for better career opportunities. He gains success and falls in love with the daughter of his boss. On the day of his engagement, Pratap gets arrested for a murder.

programme.title: Gehri Chaal
programme.desc: Shekhar threatens to expose Ratan's secret if he does not help him in a heist. A desperate Ratan assists Shekhar, but ends up becoming the prime suspect.

programme.title: Bheemla Nayak
programme.desc: A battle begins between SI Bheemla Nayak, a righteous policeman, and Daniel Shekhar, an-ex havildar, when Daniel tricks Bheemla into surrendering to corruption.

programme.title: Tara Vs Bilal
programme.desc: Bilal, a carefree man, lives an easy-going life in London and falls in love with Tara, a sensitive woman, but is unable to express his feelings to her.

programme.title: Kya Bolti Tu?
programme.desc: A young woman breaks up with her boyfriend when she learns he does not believe in true love, but her next boyfriend is not a perfect match either.

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Woh - 2019
programme.desc: Chintu Tyagi is an ordinary, middle class man who finds himself torn between his wife and another woman.

programme.title: Tara Vs Bilal
programme.desc: Bilal, a carefree man, lives an easy-going life in London and falls in love with Tara, a sensitive woman, but is unable to express his feelings to her.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Food
programme.desc: Unlike life in our modern society, in the Middle Ages, people don't eat their fill every day. We follow our foodie Howler as he scavenges around for anything that takes his fancy, overstepping his mark as a mere peasant!

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Heni's Chicken Coop
programme.desc: When Heni's new chickens take over her garden, Darwin and Newts come up with a plan to keep everyone happy.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: The Fog Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are filming a class-project documentary about a “typical day in Ayrton Park” – but things quickly become anything but typical when a mysterious fog envelops the entire downtown area.

programme.title: The Grand Ball
programme.desc: The first big Ball on campus means dresses, dancing, and dates. Rose attends with Hattie, the Mad Hatter's grandson, while Joy hopes to break Esquire Frog's curse with a midnight kiss. Vicky invites Candlewick from Pinocchio to turn everyone at the Ball into donkeys.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Croatia
programme.desc: Croatia adventure: Plitvice National Park and Bisevo exploration, European Eagle Owl encounter with local teens, rock climbing at Paklenica National Park, and a taste of Croatian folk music. A week of diverse escapades with Nicole in the incredible country of Croatia!

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Shield
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Shield. Shield tells Henry about a missing Sword kidnapped by a ferocious Dragon.

programme.title: Space Myths
programme.desc: Is Mercury the hottest planet in our solar system? No, it's not. There's a lot of misinformation about our solar system. Host Emily Calandrelli speaks to two experts who debunk many of the myths about outer space.

programme.title: How Bizarro
programme.desc: The Gaming Show gang discovers a copycat gaming channel called the Showing Game. They challenge the copycat to a multiplayer showdown.

programme.title: The Very Unusual Stalk-eyed Fly
programme.desc: The stalk-eyed fly looks fairly normal as it emerges from its pupa. Then it blows air bubbles up inside its head and along the eyestalks - like blowing up the world's weirdest balloon. It does this to make itself look more attractive to other stalk-eyed flies.

programme.title: Could We Do Without Plankton?
programme.desc: Plankton are the foundations of the ocean food chain. Without them, pretty much nothing could survive. A single teaspoon of sea water can contain over one million living organisms.

programme.title: Alchemy
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of medieval alchemy, introduced by our mad scientist friend, Howler! He's looking for a way to transmute lead into gold: it's the only way to escape insatiable Lord Roach's fort as the greedy noble seeks to increase his fortune.

programme.title: Chronicles of the Foreland
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers discover rock art and incredible biodiversity at Table Mountain National Park in South Africa. Along the way they travel on horseback to visit the Kakapo shipwreck.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: The Fog Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are filming a class-project documentary about a “typical day in Ayrton Park” – but things quickly become anything but typical when a mysterious fog envelops the entire downtown area.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Are Bees Colour Blind?
programme.desc: Despite having five eyes, bees can't see red. They can, however, see ultraviolet, which is invisible to us. Flowers that look plain to us can look spectacular to a bee, with markings that we can't see guiding it to the tasty nectar.

programme.title: Are Hot Springs Magical?
programme.desc: The Grand Prismatic Spring of Yellowstone National Park in the USA is a rainbow coloured hot spring. The colours are caused by heat loving organisms known as Cyanobacteria and various other bacteria and organisms which contain different types of coloured chemicals.

programme.title: The Very Unusual Stalk-eyed Fly
programme.desc: The stalk-eyed fly looks fairly normal as it emerges from its pupa. Then it blows air bubbles up inside its head and along the eyestalks - like blowing up the world's weirdest balloon. It does this to make itself look more attractive to other stalk-eyed flies.

programme.title: Laminated Collage
programme.desc: Create animals from leaves.

programme.desc: The doctors make the most of Mr. Grumbles' weekly shower to demonstrate how your hair has a secret skill enabling it to measure moisture in the air.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: Elément Terre[Live]
programme.desc: Le magazine Elément Terre' fait découvrir les projets et les sujets autour de l'environnement et du développent durable, partout sur la planète. '

programme.title: E5 - Detour
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of Australia’s shark highways. Find out if Greenly Island in the south is a truck stop for migrating great whites, then search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E5 - Sanctuary
programme.desc: There’s strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it’s the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival. For these animals, protection means isolation – finding sanctuary from the threats outside their boundaries.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E5 - Swamps
programme.desc: Unmask the eerie beauty of swamplands, which have inspired centuries of folklore and serve as a vital link between life and death. Swim with hungry crocodiles, see deer gamble with their lives for food, and watch carnivorous plants snap up prey.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E5 - Ireland
programme.desc: Explore an island surrounded by the mighty Atlantic ocean, subjected to pounding waves and driving rain. From the Cliffs of Moher to the Giant’s Causeway, this land has been shaped and reshaped by the power of water and violent geological forces.

programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of three elephants across three very distinct African habitats. Their travels combine to tell the story of how these emotional and intelligent creatures evolved over millions of years to survive on the continent.

programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E5 - Ireland
programme.desc: Explore an island surrounded by the mighty Atlantic ocean, subjected to pounding waves and driving rain. From the Cliffs of Moher to the Giant’s Causeway, this land has been shaped and reshaped by the power of water and violent geological forces.

programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of three elephants across three very distinct African habitats. Their travels combine to tell the story of how these emotional and intelligent creatures evolved over millions of years to survive on the continent.

programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of three elephants across three very distinct African habitats. Their travels combine to tell the story of how these emotional and intelligent creatures evolved over millions of years to survive on the continent.

programme.title: E5 - Sanctuary
programme.desc: There’s strength in numbers. Especially in the wild. For many species, it’s the very reason why individuals come together. Protecting the empire is imperative to survival. For these animals, protection means isolation – finding sanctuary from the threats outside their boundaries.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Ginbayashi Yoko (Koike Eiko), a world-class chef, loses everything when her restaurant's owner vanishes with the profits. Now supporting two children, she takes a job as a prison nutritionist, where her inventive meals begin to win over inmates. But when a former inmate is arrested again, Yoko is forced to confront a difficult question: Can people truly change? A new quest begins - earning three “Musholan” stars behind bars.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. The updated version continues to explore how we can positively help shape the character of our young people and, ultimately, the future of our nation. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: 24 Oras
programme.desc: Gives an up-to-the minute news here and around the world.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E9 - Ball
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: E5 - The Continent Of Europe
programme.desc: The Go Jetters help Grandmaster Glitch take his own souvenir selfies across Europe.

programme.title: E6 - Treasure
programme.desc: Morris and Pearl have lost one of their medals in the canal. Stanley fishes it out only have the complete collection dropped in. Stanley dons a diver's suit and goes after them.

E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Ultimate Pretend Play Day!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate pretend play day with JJ! When the cookies go missing, it's up to Detective JJ & his sidekick Bingo to follow the clues & solve the case. Then, when JJ gets nervous on his first carousel ride, Mom helps him unlock his imagination & he becomes a brave knight on a valiant steed! The pretend play continues as Captain JJ & first mate YoYo set sail on the high seas to find a lost sock. From playing chef to being a Turtle Scout, you can be anything!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster Becomes a Superhero!
programme.desc: Watch as Buster becomes a real-life superhero! When a storm starts during a nature walk, everyone panics, but it's up to brave Buster to lead them all safely home through the rain & wind. Then, Buster wants to be an emergency vehicle. He gets his chance to be a hero when he's guarding the fire station & a fire breaks out! It's up to Buster the hero fire truck to save the day. From flying like Super Buster to rescuing a kitten, he's always a hero!

programme.title: E18 - JJ's Animal Friends & Counting!
programme.desc: Join JJ for fun with animal friends & counting! JJ has to find five little ducks that ran away from their bath! Then, Bear helps JJ search nature to find his missing teddy bear. The animal fun continues as JJ plays hide-and-seek with shark toys, counts baby ducklings at the park & watches ten little dinosaur eggs hatch! Plus, act out the story of the 'Three Little Pigs' & sing along to 'Little Miss Muffet'!

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Favorite Classic Sing-Alongs!
programme.desc: Get ready to dance to all of JJ's favorite classic sing-alongs! Try to keep up as the kids groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' going a little bit faster with each verse! Then, have fun tumbling off the stage as they play a silly game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The party continues as they play the 'Who Took the Cookie?' game & march along to 'John Jacob Jingleheimer Schmidt.' It's a dance party full of timeless, interactive fun!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E428
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E475
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E7 - Japan
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan’s bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan’s nightlife. Before they head out from their Japanese adventures, Rooftop and Catfish finish the trip learning how to drift and even attempt jumping into their drifting car. After such an action packed visit to Japan, where will the duo’s travels take them next?

programme.title: E8 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in the streets and sulfur mining in the mouth of a volcano. With all of these wild and dangerous activities, can Rooftop and Catfish handle the heat of Indonesia?

programme.title: E7 - Victoria: The Southern Melting Pot
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: E5 - Highlight 5
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it’s a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there’s excitement in the air as the team give trucking superfan Chris and his disabled daughter, the ride of his life by taking him to his wedding in a big orange truck. Late at night, recovery op Snod is called to the side of the M69 to recover two crashed cars. With one on its side with the hand brake off, he must take care righting it to make sure it doesn’t roll into the passing traffic. It’s particularly tough job for Snod as his friend was killed on the same stretch of road whilst recovering a vehicle.

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E7 - Victoria: The Southern Melting Pot
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: E8 - Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. programme.title: E1 - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: E7 - Japan
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan’s bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan’s nightlife. Before they head out from their Japanese adventures, Rooftop and Catfish finish the trip learning how to drift and even attempt jumping into their drifting car. After such an action packed visit to Japan, where will the duo’s travels take them next?

programme.title: E8 - Indonesia
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in the streets and sulfur mining in the mouth of a volcano. With all of these wild and dangerous activities, can Rooftop and Catfish handle the heat of Indonesia?

programme.title: E9 - Later, Alligator
programme.desc: Billy and Terry help a homeowner with an unwanted reptilian guest in her pool. Then Billy gets hot under the collar in a house infested with bedbugs.

programme.title: The Top Bet
programme.desc: Do Do is everything Anita is not. Do Do is the brash, uncouth kind of a fishwife, while Anita is the personification of elegance, intellect and perfect deportment. Do Do works at a fish store but hopes to be a clairvoyant but Anita has this extra-sensory perception power by birth. Uncle's enterprise is in danger as top gambler Sung issues a challenge. Uncle asks Anita to take on Sung but she refuses. In desperation, Uncle goes to Do Do who playfully claims to be the ESP queen of gamblers...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Peter Lai
programme.desc: Although a lot of people recognize Peter Lai mostly from his TV drama's performance, he is arguably one of the veteran lyricists in Hong Kong music industry. Looking back from ‘Choi San Dou' to ‘Monica', his lyrics have definitely contributed the success of numerous well-known immortals. Why would he become an actor while debuted as a lyricist? Worked with so many famous stars, what related interesting stories he is going to reveal to us?

programme.title: E2 - The Shepherd And His Lights
programme.desc: Francois Duruz, a former city dweller turned shepherd and watercolorist, finds in solitude, nature and light a profound balance. He has transformed his mountain refuge into an ephemeral gallery where landscapes, colors and emotions become one.

programme.title: E5 - La Molignee
programme.desc: On the road to the province of Namur and the Molignee valley, a picturesque location of high biological value and a Natura 2000 site. Detours to Sosoye and Falaen, among the most beautiful villages in Wallonia, the Abbey of Maredsous, Biesmeree and Florennes.

programme.title: E7 - Beloved Pets
programme.desc: Many pets share the lives of Parisians. They are becoming increasingly important: we love them, we spoil them, we pamper them. In addition to the cat bars that have been around for the past decade in the capital, there are now concept stores, dog festivals and spa hotels.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Fast Money

programme.title: The Power

programme.desc: Reet, a determined journalist, navigates the struggles of her 'atta-satta' marriage, uncovering family secrets and challenging societal norms in her quest for justice and true love.

programme.title: Better Days
programme.desc: On the cusp of China's competitive national college entrance exams, Nian, a 17-year-old schoolgirl becomes the target of school bullying after a fellow classmate committed suicide. She later discovers an unlikely ally in Bei, an orphaned street youth. He becomes her protector and they form a unique bond that is soon tested when they are both implicated in a murder.

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Daniel Wu: Sky on Fire
programme.desc: Five years ago, a fire took the life of Professor Poon, and the notebook on his research for a cancer cure called “super stem cells” disappeared without a trace. His assistant Ko Yuk was escaped death thanks to security guard Chong Tin-po. After losing his wife to cancer several years ago, Tin-po entered “Sky Number One,” a top-level medical facility financed by the tycoons, as a security guard. He hopes that the lab will finally find a cure for cancer, but he realizes that Ko Yuk is the only researcher that is actually trying to develop “super stem cells” to save lives. Meanwhile, her husband, “Sky Number One” president Tong Wing-cheung, is a ruthless businessman who puts money ahead of everything and will take any means necessary to get his way...

programme.title: Love Story 2050
programme.desc: With the help of his uncle, a man travels to the future to try and bring his girlfriend back to life. Release Year: 2008 Director: Harry Baweja Awards: Best Visual Effects: Ian McFadyen, John Dietz, Merzin Tavaria Filmfare Awards

programme.title: Golmaal-Returns
programme.desc: Ekta Santoshi, obsessed with daytime soaps, suspects her husband Gopal of cheating. Her investigation spirals into hilarious chaos, leading to Gopal's wrongful arrest for a murder he didn't commit! Release Year: 2008 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: 2009 Winner Reader's Choice- Best Supporting Actor- TuSShar Kapoor
